creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 254381
patch to 1.13.3

Updating to 1.13.3. It seems like that a lot of FreeBSD-related patches are merged now, thanks to  Aleksandar Fabijanic (https://github.com/pocoproject/poco/commit/0818febed3c78a77fd6c53129a791af5d7aecd63). Thus, we can delete some patches.

On the other hand, it seems like that some compilation issues exist now, in the test code.
